title: Alchemical Emblems — Gallery 4
artist: Various (van Hove, Croll, Basil Valentine, Dee, Kelley)
description: 40 emblems of laboratory alchemy and spiritual transformation. Van Hove's alchemist, Croll's signatures, Basil Valentine's twelve keys, John Dee's Monas hieroglyphica, Kelley's visions, and emblems of distillation, putrefaction, and the nigredo stage.
notes: Focus on laboratory alchemy, nigredo, and the practical opus alongside spiritual transformation.
